2025-10-12T18:06:27.4558520Z hint: is subject to change. To configure the initial branch name to use in all

2025-10-12T18:06:27.4564999Z hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>

2025-10-12T18:06:27.4573200Z hint:
2025-10-12T18:06:27.4574619Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>
